final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 nine-grid poster for 小红书, designed to be cut into 9 individual square cards after export.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium ins风 治愈感 aesthetic with 轻拟物插画 illustration accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a strict 3列×3行 nine-grid layout; each grid cell must be self-contained and centered; visible cell borders or gutters between every cell to ensure clean cropping; no text or titles placed near grid dividing lines
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with the following content:
  格1（封面）: 大标题「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」/ 副标题「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」/ 插画元素：柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩
  格2: 标题「1. 睡前1小时别玩手机」/ 正文「蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。」/ 插画元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情小插画
  格3: 标题「2. 睡前把灯光调暗」/ 正文「暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。」/ 插画元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
  格4: 标题「3. 房间温度别太高」/ 正文「稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。」/ 插画元素：空调、温度计、被子
  格5: 标题「4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡」/ 正文「咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。」/ 插画元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号
  格6: 标题「5. 睡前洗个热水澡」/ 正文「能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。」/ 插画元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
  格7: 标题「6. 脑子停不下来就写下来」/ 正文「把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。」/ 插画元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
  格8: 标题「7. 固定上床时间」/ 正文「每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。」/ 插画元素：时钟、月亮、床
  格9: 标题「8. 试试深呼吸放松法」/ 正文「吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。」/ 底部小字「收藏这组，今晚试试看」/ 插画元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星
Scene/backdrop: each cell needs its own softly illustrated backdrop consistent with the 睡眠疗愈 theme
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, calming, 治愈感 nighttime atmosphere — exact light source treatment is yours
Color palette: must be 奶油白、浅米色、淡燕麦色、浅焦糖色 as dominant tones with minimal deep-brown text accents — exact ratios and hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a soft, matte, 轻拟物 illustration surface quality — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as listed per cell above; must include「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」(格1大标题),「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」(格1副标题),「收藏这组，今晚试试看」(格9底部小字); all in-image text must be Chinese only, no English, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve strict 3×3 grid structure with clearly visible cell boundaries suitable for direct cropping into 9 individual 小红书 cards; every cell must be fully self-contained with centered layout; text must be large, legible, and well-spaced with comfortable negative space; overall visual must read as premium 新媒体 editorial design
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing feel, excessive decoration, text near grid cut lines, English text, garbled characters, uneven or misaligned grid cells
